channel.title: Wuhan Cyrentis Technology Co., Ltd.
channel.description: Recent content on Wuhan Cyrentis Technology Co., Ltd.

item.title: China Procurement Agent
item.description: Our China procurement agency service helps overseas buyers connect with reliable manufacturers efficiently.

item.title: Ground Security Radar
item.description:
Ground security radar fits perimeter monitoring for campuses, bridges, oilfields, and industrial facilities, enabling persistent surveillance and anomaly alerts.

Typical Scenarios

  • Industrial and campus perimeter protection
  • Critical infrastructure monitoring
  • Border patrol and early warning

Delivery Scope

We support product selection, deployment design, on-site integration, and export logistics.

item.title: HD Laser Detection
item.description: HD laser detection modules deliver precise target confirmation and persistent tracking for critical monitoring tasks.

item.title: Perimeter Security
item.description: Perimeter consulting focuses on risk identification, alert process optimization, and cross-system coordination.

item.title: Radar-EO Integrated Unit
item.description: The radar-EO integrated unit improves alert accuracy through multi-source fusion and shortens implementation cycles.

item.title: Global Logistics Transport
item.description: Global logistics transport services ensure stable delivery from factory release to destination handover.

item.title: Long-range Infrared Detection
item.description: Long-range infrared detection is suitable for night patrol, harsh-weather sensing, and persistent target monitoring.

item.title: Low-altitude Counter-UAS Radar
item.description:
Low-altitude counter-UAS radar is designed for airports, energy facilities, and campuses, improving low-altitude situational awareness and risk response.

Typical Scenarios

  • Airport perimeter airspace protection
  • Event security operations
  • Energy and industrial base defense

item.title: Low-altitude Security
item.description: Low-altitude consulting covers detection, verification, and emergency response to establish reliable aerial defense capability.

item.title: Unattended Security Outpost
item.description: The unattended security outpost enables persistent surveillance in remote zones with low maintenance overhead.

item.title: Bird Identification & Deterrence
item.description: Bird identification and deterrence consulting helps reduce bird-strike risk and improve operational safety in critical zones.

item.title: Choosing Radar Frequency Bands: Pros, Cons, and Application Scenarios
item.description: Civil security radar projects rarely fail because of one parameter. They fail when frequency band choice is disconnected from site conditions, target mix, and system integration objectives.

item.title: Datasheets
item.description: Datasheets will be published here with model-level specifications, interfaces, environmental ratings, and deployment notes for Cyrentis sensor products.

item.title: Power Modules
item.description: Power modules cover regulated supply, surge protection, and battery-friendly operation profiles for long-running security systems.

item.title: Security Software Customization
item.description: This service focuses on adapting the software layer to the way a project actually operates. Cyrentis can customize interface logic, monitoring workflows, alert handling, and functional modules around specific deployment needs.

item.title: Comparison of Different Radar Scanning Architectures
item.description: In civil security radar deployment, architecture is not a cosmetic option. It determines coverage behavior, revisit pattern, mechanical wear profile, and how tracks are consumed by upper-layer command platforms.

item.title: Compliance Overview for Dual-Use Export of Civil Security Radar Products
item.description: Civil security radar projects can fail late in the delivery cycle if compliance planning starts too late. For cross-border deployment, technical readiness and regulatory readiness must progress in parallel.

item.title: SRC-X01C-1D Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

SRC-X01C-1D is positioned for drone detection missions that require reliable target detection, practical deployment, and stable all-weather operation in civil security projects.

item.title: SRC-X01D-1D Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

SRC-X01D-1D is positioned for drone detection missions that require reliable target detection, practical deployment, and stable all-weather operation in civil security projects.

item.title: SRC-X01E-1D Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

SRC-X01E-1D is positioned for drone detection missions that require reliable target detection, practical deployment, and stable all-weather operation in civil security projects.

item.title: Chipsets
item.description: Our chipset offerings include compute, control, and interface solutions used in radar processing, EO data handling, and embedded security devices.

item.title: Product Catalogs
item.description: Catalog packages will be released here with Horizon platform summaries, SRC or SOC family overviews, and service capability statements for project planning.

item.title: Security Solution Design
item.description: This service focuses on turning site requirements into a workable security solution. Cyrentis helps define how Horizon, sensor families, and field subsystems should be combined to meet coverage, verification, and operational goals.

item.title: Infrared Modules
item.description: Infrared modules are selected for stable thermal imaging performance in challenging weather and low-visibility environments.

item.title: Security Equipment Integration
item.description: This service focuses on assembling the selected security devices and software into a coordinated system. Cyrentis supports the integration of sensing equipment, software platforms, communications links, and operational interfaces.

item.title: SRC-X03C-1D Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

SRC-X03C-1D is positioned for drone detection missions that require reliable target detection, practical deployment, and stable all-weather operation in civil security projects.

SRC-X03E-1D is positioned for drone detection missions that require reliable target detection, practical deployment, and stable all-weather operation in civil security projects.

item.title: SRC-K01B-2D Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

The SRC-K01B-2D moving target surveillance radar adopts azimuth mechanical scanning and elevation digital beam forming technology. It provides all-day, all-weather continuous detection and tracking of moving targets within the area, featuring high detection sensitivity, low false alarm rate, and high precision.

item.title: Laser Ranging Modules
item.description: Laser ranging modules support high-precision distance capture for tracking logic, warning thresholds, and multi-sensor fusion workflows.

item.title: SRC-K02E-2G Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

The SRC-K02E-2G moving target surveillance radar is specifically designed for the detection and real-time tracking of moving targets on the ground and water surfaces. It serves as an all-weather, day-and-night efficient surveillance system, capable of stable operation even in complex environments and harsh weather conditions. Employing a Digital Beamforming (DBF) system, the radar can accurately detect and track various types of targets, providing detailed information such as distance, speed, azimuth, and type. It features functions including boundary crossing alerts, early warnings, and recording capabilities.

item.title: SRC-K03B-2D Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

The SRC-K03B-2D moving target surveillance radar employs an azimuth mechanical scanning and elevation digital beamforming architecture. It enables continuous, all-day, all-weather detection and tracking of moving targets within the designated area, offering advantages such as high detection sensitivity, low false alarm rate, and superior accuracy.

item.title: SRC-K05C-1D Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

SRC-K05C-1D is positioned for drone detection missions that require reliable target detection, practical deployment, and stable all-weather operation in civil security projects.

item.title: Wireless Transmission Modules
item.description: Wireless modules provide low-latency telemetry and video backhaul options across temporary, remote, and distributed project sites.

item.title: SRC-X05E-3D Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

The SRC-X05E-3D moving target surveillance radar employs a two-dimensional electronic scanning system, enabling continuous, all-day, all-weather detection and tracking of moving targets within its coverage area. It offers advantages such as high detection sensitivity, low false alarm rate, and excellent accuracy.

item.title: SRC-C03A-1G Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

SRC-C03A-1G is a practical C band surveillance radar for civil security projects that need dependable surface-target awareness without the complexity of a large multi-radar architecture. Based on the source material, the system combines one radar array with one power adapter and uses MIMO plus DBF processing to reduce clutter and improve track stability.

item.title: SRC-K04A-2G Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

The SRC-K04A-2G moving target surveillance radar employs a Digital Beamforming (DBF) system, enabling continuous, all-day, all-weather detection and tracking of moving targets within its coverage area. It offers advantages such as high detection sensitivity, low false alarm rate, and excellent accuracy.

item.title: SRC-X05B-2D Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

The SRC-X05B-2D moving target surveillance radar adopts azimuth mechanical scanning and elevation digital beamforming technology. It provides all-day, all-weather continuous detection and tracking of moving targets within the designated area, offering advantages such as high detection sensitivity, low false alarm rate, and high precision.

item.title: SRC-X05A-2G Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

The SRC-X05A-2G moving target surveillance radar employs an Active Electronically Scanned Array (AESA) system, enabling continuous, all-day, all-weather detection and tracking of moving targets within its coverage area. It offers advantages such as high detection sensitivity, low false alarm rate, and excellent accuracy.

item.title: SRC-X08B-2D Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

The SRC-X08B-2D moving target surveillance radar utilizes an azimuth mechanical scanning and elevation digital beamforming system. It enables continuous, all-day, all-weather detection and tracking of moving targets within the designated area, offering advantages such as high detection sensitivity, low false alarm rate, and high accuracy.

item.description:
Product Positioning

The SRC-X08E-3D moving target surveillance radar employs a two-dimensional electronic scanning system, enabling continuous, all-day, all-weather detection and tracking of moving targets within its coverage area. It offers advantages such as high detection sensitivity, low false alarm rate, and excellent accuracy.

item.title: SRC-X10A-2G Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

The SRC-X10A-2G moving target surveillance radar employs an Active Electronically Scanned Array (AESA) system, enabling continuous, all-day, all-weather detection and tracking of moving targets within its coverage area. It offers advantages such as high detection sensitivity, low false alarm rate, and excellent accuracy.

item.title: SRC-X16A-2G Radar
item.description:
Product Positioning

The SRC-X16A-2G target surveillance radar employs an Active Electronically Scanned Array (AESA) system, enabling continuous, all-day, all-weather detection and tracking of moving targets within its coverage area. It offers advantages such as high detection sensitivity, low false alarm rate, and excellent accuracy.

item.title: Logistics Coordination Network Expanded
item.description: News placeholder: expanded logistics coordination enables more adaptable transport planning by project type.

item.title: Cross-border Logistics Planning Template
item.description: Placeholder content: this article shows sample milestones and collaboration points for cross-border logistics execution.

item.title: Pilot Shipment Progress for Overseas Project
item.description: News placeholder: the first pilot shipment reached destination and moved into on-site integration testing.

item.title: EO Commissioning Checklist
item.description: Placeholder content: this entry demonstrates a simple commissioning checklist structure for EO project delivery.

item.title: Radar Site Planning Basics
item.description: Placeholder content: this article outlines baseline methods for survey, obstacle review, and coverage planning in radar projects.

item.title: Cyrentis Defined Its Platform, Sensors, and Services Structure
item.description: Wuhan Cyrentis Technology introduced its operating structure around three connected areas: the Horizon software platform, sensor products, and service capabilities covering software customization, solution design, and equipment integration.

item.title: Contact
item.description: For Horizon customization, security solution design, sensor selection, or equipment integration support, please contact us through the form and share your monitoring scenario.
